title: National Cybersecurity Risk Management Framework
summary: Provides Bahrain’s authoritative approach to information-security risk management, including risk identification, assessment, mitigation and monitoring, and integrates CIS controls as a common framework for public, private and CNI entities.

theme_notes.cybersecurity.security_controls_framewor: National reference framework for managing cybersecurity risk.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.critical_infrastructure: National reference framework for cybersecurity risk management.

notes: Related instruments: Related to Baseline Cyber Security Controls and CNI Cybersecurity Controls
